description_long: This is a female adult pedestrian figure dressed in a layered, knee-length dress with puffed sleeves and a wide sash tied at the waist. The dress features a ruffled collar and a double-layered skirt, giving it a soft, elegant appearance. She wears round glasses and has long, wavy hair styled in two buns on top, with the rest cascading down her back. Her footwear consists of closed-toe, strap-heeled shoes, and she has a decorative bracelet on her left wrist. The overall look is whimsical and fashion-forward, with a blend of modern and vintage influences. The figure's posture is upright and relaxed, with arms slightly bent at the elbows.
description: A female adult pedestrian in a layered, ruffled dress with puffed sleeves, round glasses, and long wavy hair styled in buns. She stands upright in strap-heeled shoes, exuding a whimsical, elegant style.
description_view_0: Front view shows the ruffled dress, sash, round glasses, and full hairstyle with buns; arms and shoes are clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the layered skirt, and the cascading hair; arm and shoe details are visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the hairstyle, the sash tied at the waist, and the layered skirt; both legs and shoes are visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, layered dress, and hair; bracelet on left wrist is visible.
attribute_clothing_type: layered knee-length dress with puffed sleeves, ruffled collar, and wide sash, accessorized with a bracelet and round glasses
attribute_hairstyle: long wavy hair styled in two buns with loose length
